_comment: Self-contained ADO daemon profile. Select with `CodeReviewDaemon --review mcqdb`. Everything needed to run is here — no launch env vars. NOTE: the absolute paths below are machine-specific (this box's sandbox-workspaces + .run dirs); adjust them if you move machines. The pool root MUST live under SandboxGateway:WorkspaceBasePath (the gateway's real host base). See ADO-ONBOARDING.md.

Ado._comment: azure-devops-mcp public client id (see LmStreaming.Sample/AuthProviderGuide.md). MSAL.NET interactive (browser + loopback + PKCE), no secret. Sign in ONCE out-of-band into the shared TokenStoreDir below; the daemon restores it at boot.
